title: Implement pipeline runner and single execution model
goal: Create deterministic pipeline runner with a single explicit stage execution model.
scope_summary: Implement runPipeline, CLI entrypoint, and enforce a single consistent stage invocation model.
acceptance_criteria: Single execution model used for all stages
repair_notes: If multiple execution styles exist → FAIL
If CLI behavior differs between stages → FAIL
stage_execution_rules: Pipeline runner must use one single documented execution model for all stage invocations.
The chosen execution model must be implemented consistently in code, tests, and docs.
Runner must not support parallel invocation models.
Each stage must receive explicit input paths.
Runner must pass explicit output_dir per stage.
Stage outputs must be resolved from output_dir only.
